properties.Test Case: Publish ePUB with title "Unsafe ~!@#$%^&*()_-+={}[]|\:;"'<>.?/" (JT 6.3: produced an epub with the name "Unsafe ~! # %^ amp _-+= []". That was too hard for my epub reader (epub+) and it locked up opening it. But the content was fine; it opened when I renamed it to simply "Unsafe".
properties.Steps: Publish ePUB with title "Unsafe ~!@#$%^&*()_-+={}[]|\:;"'<>.?/" (JT 6.3: produced an epub with the name "Unsafe ~! # %^ amp    _-+=  []". That was too hard for my epub reader (epub+) and it locked up opening it. But the content was fine; it opened when I renamed it to simply "Unsafe".
